name: Reliance on Data/Memory Layout
description: The product makes invalid assumptions about how protocol data or memory is organized at lower levels. When platforms or protocol versions change, in-memory data organization may shift in unintended ways, leading to accessing wrong fields or type confusion.
detection_pattern: Look for STRUCTURAL nodes that assume fixed memory/data layout (offsets, struct packing, endianness) when reading from INGRESS or STORAGE nodes, without a TRANSFORM node that normalizes or validates the layout. The missing mediator is a layout validation/abstraction layer.
